fans {
  name: "SYSFAN"
  speed {
  }
  control {
    current_method: "SmartFan IV"
    current_percent: 0.60784313725490191
    methods {
      name: "Manual"
      nuvoton_method {
        manual_params {
        }
      }
    }
    methods {
      name: "Thermal Cruise"
      nuvoton_method {
        thermal_cruise_params {
          start_value: 1
          stop_value: 1
          stop_time: 60
          critical_temp: 125
        }
      }
    }
    methods {
      name: "Speed Cruise"
      nuvoton_method {
        speed_cruise_params {
          target_speed_count_high: 0
          tolerance_high: 0
          step_up_value: 0
          step_down_value: 0
        }
      }
    }
    methods {
      name: "SmartFan IV"
      nuvoton_method {
        smart_fan_iv_params {
          control_points {
            temp: 20
            percent: 60
          }
          control_points {
            temp: 45
            percent: 69.803921568627445
          }
          control_points {
            temp: 60
            percent: 84.705882352941174
          }
          control_points {
            temp: 70
            percent: 100
          }
        }
      }
    }
    temp_source: "PECI0Calibration"
    temp_value: 22.5
  }
}
fans {
  name: "CPUFAN"
  speed {
    value: 505
  }
  control {
    current_method: "SmartFan IV"
    current_percent: 0.21568627450980393
    methods {
      name: "Manual"
      nuvoton_method {
        manual_params {
        }
      }
    }
    methods {
      name: "Thermal Cruise"
      nuvoton_method {
        thermal_cruise_params {
          target_temp: 50
          start_value: 1
          stop_value: 1
          stop_time: 60
          critical_temp: 125
        }
      }
    }
    methods {
      name: "Speed Cruise"
      nuvoton_method {
        speed_cruise_params {
          target_speed_count_low: 50
          target_speed_count_high: 0
          tolerance_high: 0
          step_up_value: 0
          step_down_value: 0
        }
      }
    }
    methods {
      name: "SmartFan IV"
      nuvoton_method {
        smart_fan_iv_params {
          control_points {
            temp: 20
            percent: 20
          }
          control_points {
            temp: 45
            percent: 40
          }
          control_points {
            temp: 65
            percent: 69.803921568627445
          }
          control_points {
            temp: 70
            percent: 100
          }
        }
      }
    }
    temp_source: "PECI0Calibration"
    temp_value: 22.5
  }
}

      nuvoton_method {
        speed_cruise_params {
          target_speed_count_high: 0

      name: "Thermal Cruise"

        thermal_cruise_params {
          start_value: 1
          stop_value: 1
          stop_time: 60
          critical_temp: 125
        }
      }
    }
    methods {
      name: "Speed Cruise"
      nuvoton_method {
        speed_cruise_params {
          target_speed_count_high: 0
          tolerance_high: 0
          step_up_value: 0
          step_down_value: 0
        }
      }
    }

      name: "SmartFan IV"
      nuvoton_method {

          control_points {

fans {
  name: "AUXFAN2"
  speed {
  }
  control {
    current_method: "Manual"
    current_percent: 0.6
    methods {
      name: "Manual"
      nuvoton_method {
        manual_params {
        }
      }
    }
    methods {
      name: "Thermal Cruise"
      nuvoton_method {
        thermal_cruise_params {
          start_value: 1
          stop_value: 1
          stop_time: 60
          step_up_time: 10
          step_down_time: 10
          critical_temp: 100
        }
      }
    }
    methods {
      name: "Speed Cruise"
      nuvoton_method {
        speed_cruise_params {
          target_speed_count_high: 0
          tolerance_high: 0
          step_up_time: 10
          step_down_time: 10
          step_up_value: 1
          step_down_value: 1
        }
      }
    }
    methods {
      name: "SmartFan IV"
      nuvoton_method {
        smart_fan_iv_params {
          control_points {
            temp: 25
            percent: 54.901960784313729
          }
          control_points {
            temp: 35
            percent: 66.666666666666657
          }
          control_points {
            temp: 45
            percent: 78.431372549019613
          }
          control_points {
            temp: 55
            percent: 90.196078431372555
          }
        }
      }
    }
    temp_source: "AUXTIN0"
    temp_value: 91.5
  }
}

      }

          start_value: 1
          stop_value: 1
          stop_time: 60

      }

      name: "Speed Cruise"
      nuvoton_method {
        speed_cruise_params {
          target_speed_count_high: 0

          step_down_value: 0

fans {
  name: "AUXFAN4"
  speed {
  }
  control {
    current_method: "SmartFan IV"
    current_percent: 1
    methods {
      name: "Manual"
      nuvoton_method {
        manual_params {
        }
      }
    }
    methods {
      name: "Thermal Cruise"
      nuvoton_method {
        thermal_cruise_params {
          start_value: 1
          stop_value: 1
          stop_time: 60
          critical_temp: 100
        }
      }
    }
    methods {
      name: "Speed Cruise"
      nuvoton_method {
        speed_cruise_params {
          target_speed_count_high: 0
          tolerance_high: 0
          step_up_value: 0
          step_down_value: 0
        }
      }
    }
    methods {
      name: "SmartFan IV"
      nuvoton_method {
        smart_fan_iv_params {
          control_points {
            percent: 100
          }
          control_points {
            temp: 100
            percent: 100
          }
          control_points {
            temp: 100
            percent: 100
          }
          control_points {
            temp: 100
            percent: 100
          }
        }
      }
    }
    temp_source: "PECI0Calibration"
    temp_value: 22.5
  }
}
